title: corybas naviculisepalus
intro: Corybas naviculisepalus, also known as the boat-shaped helmet orchid, is a species of orchid native to Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Corybas naviculisepalus are said to include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, Corybas naviculisepalus is often used as an infusion or tincture, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
